legacy_comment_expected: Legacy Chunk 6 comments identify two recorded state/UT change events in the tracker sources.
interpretation: Compare row-level current detections with tracker_state_change_events.csv because row counts can exceed event counts.

legacy_comment_expected: Legacy Chunk 6 comments identify four unrecorded state/UT naming/split changes requiring manual attention.
interpretation: These are preserved as documented legacy correction notes, not inferred from active tracker rows.

legacy_comment_expected: Legacy Chunk 6 comments record 16 districts changing names within the sampling periods.
interpretation: A current count different from 16 reflects active tracker/correction changes and should be reviewed before describing it as an improvement.

legacy_comment_expected: Legacy Chunk 6 comments record between 6 and 10 same-name districts in each year of interest.
interpretation: A current count of zero means the active cleaned tracker no longer exposes this raw ambiguity; it should be reported as resolved-by-current-cleaning, not as proof that the legacy QA was unnecessary.
